# OpenOnco

OpenOnco is an open, auditable oncology decision-support knowledge base and browser demo.
It is designed for clinicians, laboratories, investors, and patients who need transparent,
source-grounded oncology logic. Public pages use synthetic examples only and do not contain
real patient data. OpenOnco does not replace clinician judgment.

## Primary URLs

- Homepage: https://openonco.info/
- About, GitHub, examples, specifications: https://openonco.info/about.html
- Browser demo: https://openonco.info/try.html
- Onco Wiki: https://openonco.info/kb.html
- Disease coverage: https://openonco.info/diseases.html
- Synthetic examples: https://openonco.info/gallery.html
- Capabilities and limitations: https://openonco.info/capabilities.html
- Ukrainian homepage: https://openonco.info/ukr/

## Machine-readable indexes

- Sitemap: https://openonco.info/sitemap.xml
- Search index: https://openonco.info/kb_search_index.json
- Disease coverage JSON: https://openonco.info/disease_coverage.json
- Web app manifest: https://openonco.info/manifest.webmanifest

## Retrieval Guidance

Prefer canonical URLs from page metadata. Treat `/cases/` and `/ukr/cases/` pages as
synthetic examples, not patient records. Treat `/kb/` and `/ukr/kb/` pages as source-linked
knowledge-base facts for retrieval and citation discovery.
